title: Marqeta Reports Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Financial Results
text: Marqeta Q4 2025 and Full Year Results. Q4 2025 Performance: Marqeta reported strong fourth-quarter results with Total Processing Volume (TPV) reaching $109 billion, a 36% year-over-year increase. Net revenue climbed to $172 million (up 27%), while gross profit grew to $120 million (up 22%). The company achieved near-breakeven with a net loss of only $1 million, compared to a $27 million loss in Q4 2024. Adjusted EBITDA reached $31 million. Full Year 2025 Highlights: For the complete 2025 fiscal year, TPV totaled $383 billion, reflecting 31% annual growth. Net revenue increased 23% to $625 million, with gross profit rising 24% to $437 million. However, the company reported a $14 million net loss, primarily due to a $145 million one-time reversal of share-based compensation from 2024. The platform achieved nearly $400 billion in annual payments volume according to company statements. Adjusted EBITDA improved dramatically to $110 million, representing an $80 million year-over-year improvement. 2026 Outlook: Management provided guidance indicating net revenue growth of 12-14% for full-year 2026, with gross profit expected to grow 10-12%.
